data.name: Moist Depot: Adult Store Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Have you ever dreamed of running your own questionable business? Welcome to Moist Depot, where your dirty entrepreneurial dreams are about to come true!

Moist Depot: Adult Store Sim is a first-person business management game where you transform a seedy, run-down storefront into a booming emporium of adult entertainment. Stock the shelves with adult parody products, manage your finances, and serve customers in this satirical take on the simulation genre.

You begin with nothing but a single empty shelf. It's up to you to handle every aspect of the business, from ordering and unboxing new "inventory" to keeping the floors clean and the lights on. Price your products, serve customers at the register, and watch the cash flow in.

As your profits grow, so does your store. Knock down walls, expand your floor space, and unlock new, lucrative attractions to satisfy your clientele. Will you build a basement movie theater screening questionable classics? Or open a private peep show for your most discerning customers? Hire help, decorate the space to your liking, and build an empire of pleasure, one sale at a time.

Key Features

  • Build Your Empire: Transform a tiny, empty room into an adult superstore. You control the layout, the decor, and the destiny of Moist Depot.

  • Manage Your Stock: Browse a catalog full of adult parody products, from movies and erotic books to novelty toys and décor. Keep your shelves stocked to keep the customers coming back.

  • Expand Your Business: Unlock and build new attractions, including a basement movie theater and a peep show room, each bringing new gameplay mechanics and profit opportunities.

  • Hire & Manage Staff: You can't do it all alone! As you grow, hire employees to help with tasks like stocking shelves, working the cash registers, and keeping the store clean.

  • Customize Your Store: Use your profits to buy and place a wide range of cosmetic items, from neon signs to questionable statues. Some special decorations will even attract more customers!

data.short_description: Build, stock, and expand your own adult entertainment empire in this first-person simulation game. Manage a catalog of hilarious parody products, unlock new and profitable rooms like a peep show, and turn a dusty storefront into the town's number one destination for adult fun.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
